Converting 22.83:
22.83 * 1.979:
22.83 * 0.009 = 0.20547
22.83 * 0.070 = 1.59810
22.83 * 0.900 = 20.54700
22.83 * 1.000 = 22.83000
0.20547 + 1.59810 = 1.80357
1.80357 + 20.54700 = 22.35057
22.35057 + 22.83000 = 45.18057
= 45.180

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{45.180}
